actions.expression:
SELECT zxtc.sid,
       zxtc.ywry,
       zxtc.sqdh,
       zxtc.zxtclx,
       zxtc.bm,
       zxtc.wfgs,
       zxtc.sqry,
       zxtc.bz,
       zxtc.zxhf,
       zxtc.fkbz
FROM zxtc 
WHERE (zxtc.company_name=[客户资料.公司名称]) 
ORDER BY zxtc.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT khly.khly,khly.khlyz,khly.sm 
FROM khly 
WHERE khly.khlyz=[客户资料.来源一级] 
  AND khly.khly=[客户资料.客户来源] 
ORDER BY khly.khly ASC LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT shyh.sid,
       shyh.lCompany,
       shyh.lBank,
       shyh.lAccount,
       shyh.TBank,
       shyh.TBank1,
       shyh.lBank1,
       shyh.TAccount,
       shyh.lBankAddress
FROM shyh 
ORDER BY shyh.sid ASC

actions.name: 查看年度_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 查看年度_ButtonEdit
actions.expression:
SELECT wxhtsheet.qsny,wxhtsheet.cplb,WXHTSHEET.yjfl,SUM(CASE WHEN ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) <= 1) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.htsl > 0) THEN wxhtsheet.zjez ELSE 0 END) AS ymj, SUM(CASE WHEN ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) > 1) 
  AND ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) <= 5) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.htsl > 0) THEN wxhtsheet.zjez ELSE 0 END) AS ywmj, SUM(CASE WHEN ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) > 5) 
  AND ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) <= 10) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.htsl > 0) THEN wxhtsheet.zjez ELSE 0 END) AS wyrmj, SUM(CASE WHEN ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) > 10) 
  AND ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) <= 20) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.htsl > 0) THEN wxhtsheet.zjez ELSE 0 END) AS yrrrmj, SUM(CASE WHEN ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) > 20) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.htsl > 0) THEN wxhtsheet.zjez ELSE 0 END) AS rrmjys, SUM(CASE WHEN (wxhtsheet.htsl > 0) THEN wxhtsheet.zjez ELSE 0 END) AS sy 
FROM wxhtsheet 
WHERE (wxhtsheet.khmc = [客户资料.公司名称]) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.qsn=[客户资料.客人采购习惯分析.年份]) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.htsl > 0) 
GROUP BY wxhtsheet.qsny,wxhtsheet.cplb,WXHTSHEET.yjfl 
ORDER BY wxhtsheet.qsny,wxhtsheet.cplb

actions.name: 厨房用品_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 厨房用品_ButtonEdit
actions.expression:
SELECT WXHTSHEET.yjfl,SUM(CASE WHEN ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) <= 1) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.htsl > 0) THEN wxhtsheet.zjez ELSE 0 END) AS ymj, SUM(CASE WHEN ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) > 1) 
  AND ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) <= 5) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.htsl > 0) THEN wxhtsheet.zjez ELSE 0 END) AS ywmj, SUM(CASE WHEN ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) > 5) 
  AND ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) <= 10) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.htsl > 0) THEN wxhtsheet.zjez ELSE 0 END) AS wyrmj, SUM(CASE WHEN ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) > 10) 
  AND ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) <= 20) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.htsl > 0) THEN wxhtsheet.zjez ELSE 0 END) AS yrrrmj, SUM(CASE WHEN ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) > 20) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.htsl > 0) THEN wxhtsheet.zjez ELSE 0 END) AS rrmjys, SUM(CASE WHEN (wxhtsheet.htsl > 0) THEN wxhtsheet.zjez ELSE 0 END) AS sy,[客户资料.客人采购习惯分析.厨房用品] as zj 
FROM wxhtsheet 
WHERE (wxhtsheet.cplb = "厨房用品") 
  AND (wxhtsheet.khmc =[客户资料.公司名称]) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.qsn =[客户资料.客人采购习惯分析.年份]) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.htsl > 0) 
GROUP BY WXHTSHEET.yjfl

WHERE (wxhtsheet.cplb = "食品") 
  AND (wxhtsheet.khmc =[客户资料.公司名称]) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.qsn =[客户资料.客人采购习惯分析.年份]) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.htsl > 0) 
GROUP BY WXHTSHEET.yjfl

actions.name: 日化用品_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 日化用品_ButtonEdit
actions.expression:
SELECT WXHTSHEET.yjfl,SUM(CASE WHEN ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) <= 1) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.htsl > 0) THEN wxhtsheet.zjez ELSE 0 END) AS ymj, SUM(CASE WHEN ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) > 1) 
  AND ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) <= 5) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.htsl > 0) THEN wxhtsheet.zjez ELSE 0 END) AS ywmj, SUM(CASE WHEN ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) > 5) 
  AND ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) <= 10) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.htsl > 0) THEN wxhtsheet.zjez ELSE 0 END) AS wyrmj, SUM(CASE WHEN ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) > 10) 
  AND ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) <= 20) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.htsl > 0) THEN wxhtsheet.zjez ELSE 0 END) AS yrrrmj, SUM(CASE WHEN ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) > 20) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.htsl > 0) THEN wxhtsheet.zjez ELSE 0 END) AS rrmjys, SUM(CASE WHEN (wxhtsheet.htsl > 0) THEN wxhtsheet.zjez ELSE 0 END) AS sy,[客户资料.客人采购习惯分析.日化用品] as zj 
FROM wxhtsheet 
WHERE (wxhtsheet.cplb = "日化用品") 
  AND (wxhtsheet.khmc =[客户资料.公司名称]) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.qsn =[客户资料.客人采购习惯分析.年份]) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.htsl > 0) 
GROUP BY WXHTSHEET.yjfl

actions.name: 小家电_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 小家电_ButtonEdit
actions.expression:
SELECT WXHTSHEET.yjfl,SUM(CASE WHEN ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) <= 1) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.htsl > 0) THEN wxhtsheet.zjez ELSE 0 END) AS ymj, SUM(CASE WHEN ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) > 1) 
  AND ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) <= 5) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.htsl > 0) THEN wxhtsheet.zjez ELSE 0 END) AS ywmj, SUM(CASE WHEN ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) > 5) 
  AND ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) <= 10) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.htsl > 0) THEN wxhtsheet.zjez ELSE 0 END) AS wyrmj, SUM(CASE WHEN ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) > 10) 
  AND ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) <= 20) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.htsl > 0) THEN wxhtsheet.zjez ELSE 0 END) AS yrrrmj, SUM(CASE WHEN ((wxhtsheet.zjez / wxhtsheet.htsl) > 20) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.htsl > 0) THEN wxhtsheet.zjez ELSE 0 END) AS rrmjys, SUM(CASE WHEN (wxhtsheet.htsl > 0) THEN wxhtsheet.zjez ELSE 0 END) AS sy,[客户资料.客人采购习惯分析.小家电] as zj 
FROM wxhtsheet 
WHERE (wxhtsheet.cplb = "小家电") 
  AND (wxhtsheet.khmc =[客户资料.公司名称]) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.qsn =[客户资料.客人采购习惯分析.年份]) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.htsl > 0) 
GROUP BY WXHTSHEET.yjfl

       wxht.jhfs,

actions.expression:
SELECT ywrybiao.bm,ywrybiao.wfgs,ywrybiao.rybh
FROM ywrybiao 
WHERE (ywrybiao.ryxm=[客户资料.业务人员]) 
ORDER BY ywrybiao.bm DESC LIMIT 1

ORDER BY ywfw.zwmc ASC

actions.expression:
SELECT ywrybiao.bm,ywrybiao.wfgs,ywrybiao.rybh
FROM ywrybiao 
WHERE (ywrybiao.ryxm=[客户资料.查看人员清单.业务员]) 
ORDER BY ywrybiao.bm DESC LIMIT 1
